title: Device Home Screen - Disconnected device
scenario: When a paired and connected device is turned off, the Device Home Screen shows the device as "Not Connected" with a crossed red dot, greyed out image and battery icons, and version info.
steps: Pair and connect a device to the system.
expected: The Device Home Screen should display: Device Name (with "i" icon if applicable), a crossed red dot with "Not Connected" label, a greyed out device image, a "..." button, greyed out Battery icons, and "Version X.Y.Z".
